result.stdout:
Automatically update your .NET projects to the specified version of .NetCore

Usage: Upgrade [options] [command]

Options:
  -?|-h|--help  Show help information

Commands:
  Upgrade       Searches the specified directory and upgrades various files to the requested version of .Net

Run 'Upgrade [command] --help' for more information about a command.

commands.payload:
Automatically update your .NET projects to the specified version of .NetCore

Usage: Upgrade [options] [command]

Options:
  -?|-h|--help  Show help information

Commands:
  Upgrade       Searches the specified directory and upgrades various files to the requested version of .Net

Run 'Upgrade [command] --help' for more information about a command.

result.stdout:
dotnet-Automatize

Searches the specified directory and upgrades various files to the requested version of .Net

Usage: Upgrade Upgrade [options] <path>

Arguments:
  path                                  Path to the directory to upgrade. Defaults to current location.

Options:
  -?|-h|--help                          Show help information
  -l|--useLinux                         The Base image to use in your DockerFile. Valid options are 'Alpine' or 'Linux'
  -p|--package                          Specifies whether the project being upgraded a package/library or not - determines which docker base image to use
  -mv|--minorversion[:<MINOR_VERSION>]  Specify which minor version of .Net Core you want 2 or 1. Major version is always 2 at the moment.
